purpose: Regularly find viral short-video signals before writing NeuroPravo scripts.

statuses.viral_candidate: Fresh, scored, relevant, with visible public signal and transferable mechanic.
statuses.potential_signal: Interesting but incomplete metrics or approximate date; requires manual review.
statuses.reject: Weak signal, weak fit, stale, high copy risk, or no transferable mechanic.

controller_rules: Do not assign script writing before source_candidates_review.md exists.
Do not treat a script as success unless the source signal is documented.
Window 2 owns scripts only after approved signal.
Copy mechanics, not text, character, phrase order, or conclusion.
